title: Pyrex Optima + Forged Aluminium Frying Pan 22 cm, Black,4937811
availability_text: Only 15 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Extra strong and non-stick 22 cm frying pan suitable for all types of optimal forged aluminium fires
Forged aluminium with 3.8 mm thickness for optimal heat distribution. Suitable for all hobs including induction hobs
Full induction smooth bottom for perfect induction flow detection and energy saving. Whitford Xylan+ dual-layer interior non-stick coating for enhanced non-stick
Free from PFOA, cadmium or lead. Deep frying pan - greater capacity and less splashing
Ergonomic handle with soft touch silicone finish with new "Y" shape. Dishwasher Safe
description: Discover the new Pyrex Optima + Forged Aluminium Frying Pan
